features.description: Repo contains a grounded PRD, architecture note, data-model note, diagram, and ordered task list for the target-routing rebuild
steps: Open the PRD and verify the target-routing product story is defined
Open the architecture note and verify app, target, source, and session boundaries are documented
Open the data-model note and verify durable tables and ownership rules are defined
Open the diagram and verify the runtime relationship is documented
Open the task list and verify the implementation order is documented

features.description: Backend persists apps and lists them after backend restart
steps: Create an app through the REST API
Verify the app appears in GET /api/apps
Restart the backend with the same database
Verify the app still appears in GET /api/apps

features.description: App can declare a video target named yolov5
steps: Create an app
Create a target named yolov5 with kind video
List targets for the app
Verify yolov5 appears with target kind video

features.description: App can declare a second video target named yolov8
steps: Create an app
Create a target named yolov8 with kind video
List targets for the app
Verify yolov8 appears with target kind video

features.description: App can declare an rgbd target named rgbd-view
steps: Create an app
Create a target named rgbd-view with kind rgbd
List targets for the app
Verify rgbd-view appears with target kind rgbd

features.description: App can declare an rgbd target named orbbec-pointcloud
steps: Create an app
Create a target named orbbec-pointcloud with kind rgbd
List targets for the app
Verify orbbec-pointcloud appears with target kind rgbd

features.description: User can pick a listed canonical URI without handling raw stream names
steps: Open the frontend or device catalog API
Inspect a listed device preset entry
Verify a canonical insightos:// URI is shown
Verify no app-source binding flow asks for a stream name

features.description: Injecting a camera URI with target yolov5 routes primary frames to the app
steps: Create an app and declare target yolov5
Inject a camera URI with target yolov5
Verify the backend creates a logical session
Verify the SDK receives primary target callbacks

features.description: Injecting a second camera URI with target yolov8 routes independent primary frames to the app
steps: Create an app and declare target yolov8
Inject a camera URI with target yolov8
Verify a second source is attached independently
Verify the SDK receives primary target callbacks for yolov8

features.description: Injecting an RGBD URI with target rgbd-view routes color and depth callbacks
steps: Create an app and declare target rgbd-view
Inject an RGBD URI with target rgbd-view
Verify the backend computes color and depth bindings
Verify the SDK receives color and depth target callbacks

features.description: Injecting an RGBD URI with target orbbec-pointcloud routes color and depth callbacks for pointcloud logic
steps: Create an app and declare target orbbec-pointcloud
Inject an RGBD URI with target orbbec-pointcloud
Verify the backend computes color and depth bindings
Verify the SDK receives color and depth target callbacks

features.description: Source injection rejects requests with a missing or unknown target
steps: Create an app
Attempt to inject a source without target
Verify the API rejects the request
Attempt to inject a source with an unknown target
Verify the API rejects the request

features.description: Source injection rejects a source whose resolved stream set cannot satisfy the target kind
steps: Create an app and declare an rgbd target
Inject a single-stream camera URI into that target
Verify the backend rejects the request with a compatibility error

features.description: Apps, targets, and sources survive backend restart while runtime state is normalized to stopped
steps: Create an app, target, and source
Restart the backend with the same database
List the app sources
Verify the source is still present and its state is stopped

features.description: Explicitly restarting a persisted source creates fresh runtime sessions
steps: Create an app, target, and source
Restart the backend with the same database
Call source start on the persisted source
Verify a fresh runtime session is created

features.description: Browser UI supports create-target-bind-start-stop flow end to end
steps: Open the frontend
Create an app
Create a target
Bind a listed URI to that target
Start the source
Stop the source
Verify status updates are visible in the UI
